summary: Frontend testing iteration 4 - VERIFIED react-window v1.8.10 fix for mobile virtualized list. All core functionality working. The critical crash from iteration 3 (react-window API mismatch) is FIXED.

issues: Dynamic Mode toggle is visible but non-master locations are still rejected. The setting 'allowNonMasterLocations: false' in mockData conflicts with Dynamic Mode UI indication.

VIRTUALIZED_LIST_FIX.description: react-window v1.8.10 with FixedSizeList works correctly. Tested with 1, 2, and 3 items - NO CRASH
evidence: Screenshot showing 3 items rendered: Premium Olive Oil 500ml, Whole Wheat Flour 1kg, Organic Rice 5kg
Console shows no TypeError or Object.values errors
App remains functional after multiple scans

SCAN_FLOW.description: Complete scan flow works: Login -> /scan -> Select location -> Scan barcodes -> Items appear -> Submit
evidence: Items display with barcode, name, quantity, delete button

BUG_1_REGRESSION_SUBMITTED_LOCATION_VIEW.description: Submitted locations show 'already scanned and completed' message correctly
evidence: WH-A2 submitted successfully with 'Submit & Lock' dialog
Re-entering WH-A2 shows: 'Location Warehouse A - Section 2 is already scanned and completed. Manual authorization required to reopen.'

BUG_2_REGRESSION_LOCATION_ISOLATION.description: Items from one location do NOT leak to another location
evidence: WH-B-CS shows only its own items (LED Bulb, Hand Sanitizer) - NO Notebook
Console shows: 'Loaded 2 existing items from context (submitted: false)' for WH-B-CS

ITEM_OPERATIONS.description: Delete and edit quantity work correctly
evidence: Changed Green Tea qty from 1 to 5 - UI updated to show new total
Delete button works - console shows '2 items remaining, saved to localStorage'

critical_code_review_comments: react-window v1.8.10 import is correct: import { FixedSizeList } from 'react-window'
VirtualizedItemRow component properly uses v1.x API with itemCount, itemSize, itemData props
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock master data
context_for_next_testing_agent: react-window downgrade to v1.8.10 FIXED the crash. The app uses FixedSizeList with v1.x API (itemCount, itemSize, itemData, children). Use master location codes (WH-A1, WH-B-CS, etc.) and master barcodes (8901234567890, etc.) for testing as allowNonMasterProducts/Locations is set to false in mockSettings.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: react-window v2.2.7 uses different API than v1.x. Code was using v1.x API but library was v2.x causing TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Downgraded react-window from 2.2.7 to 1.8.10 in package.json
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested with 1, 2, 3 items in virtualized list - all render correctly without crash
